content:
Happy to 

https://mycontinuum.xyz/

and click "Downloads" that will explain more about Continuum and how you can set it up. and run it.

Let me know if you have any questions 

Here is also a demo of installing and running continuum I posted a while ago (2/16/2026)

https://is.gd/kfguKH
